incoming.page_description.text: Tohatohahia ngā mōhiohio māmā haumaru ki tō mātou rōpū tautoko

incoming.feature_disabled_title.text: Kāore te Āhuatanga e Waatea Ana

incoming.feature_disabled_description.text: Kua monokia tēnei āhuatanga i tēnei wā. Tēnā whakapā ki te tautoko mō te āwhina.

incoming.memo_placeholder.text: He whakaahua poto (hei tauira, Tono tautuhi kupuhipa)

incoming.memo_hint.text: Āwhina mātou ki te ārahi i tō karere ki te tangata tika

incoming.recipient_aria_label.text: Tīpakohia tētahi kaipūtake mō tēnei karere huna

incoming.recipient_hint.text: Kōwhiria ko wai ka whiwhi i tēnei karere haumaru

incoming.no_recipients_available.text: Kāore he kaipūtake e waatea ana

incoming.secret_content_placeholder.text: Mototia ngā mōhiohio māmā ki konei (ngā kupuhipa, ngā kī, etc.)

incoming.secret_content_hint.text: Ka muhumuhu tēnei mōhiohio, ka tirohia kotahi-wā anō

incoming.success_info_description.text: Ka taea e te kaipūtake te tiro i tēnei karere huna kotahi-wā anō. I muri i tōna tirohia, ka mukua mō ake tonu te karere huna.

incoming.tagline2.text: Pupuritia ngā kupuhipa me ngā raraunga tūmataiti kia kaua ai e puta ki ngā kōrero īmēra me ngā tuhinga kōrero

incoming.upgrade_required_description.text: Me te whakahou mahere tēnei āhuatanga. Tēnā whakapā ki te kaipupuri pūkete hei whakahohea i ngā karere huna tae mai.

incoming.validation_memo_too_long.text: Me {max} pūāhua, iti iho rānei te memo

incoming.validation_secret_required.text: E hiahiatia ana ngā ihirangi karere huna

incoming.validation_feature_disabled.text: Kāore te āhuatanga karere huna tae mai i whakahohea

incoming.validation_form_errors.text: Tēnā tirohia te puka mō ngā hapa
